nodes.name: Yellow chat
nodes.summary: Yellow chat（Yellow chat，学名 Epthianura crocea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Australian Birds: their Nests and Eggs. Phoenix Offset, China. Their habitat is subject to high temperatures for most of the year and contains marshy plains vegetated with saltbush, rank grasses, or cumbungi reeds. These marshes have been formed by marine lagoons or inland artesian bore drains, creating a saline environment. This distribution includes the central arid region and the hot, subhumid monsoonal region
